## Summary

This April 2026 guide from DevToolPicks is the best-calibrated source in the research set for the specific use case the stinger serves: solo founders and indie hackers making keyword research tool decisions on real budgets. The guide opens by calling out the Ahrefs pricing mismatch directly: Ahrefs is designed for agencies and large teams, and the Lite plan at $129/month is appropriate only once revenue justifies the investment. The guide's "quick verdict" matrix is immediately actionable for founders at different stages.

The four recommended alternatives with their precise positioning: (1) Semrush Pro ($139.95/month, $117.33 annual) - the direct Ahrefs replacement with better content marketing toolkit and a 7-day free trial; (2) SE Ranking ($65/month) - the best value full-featured alternative for budget-conscious solo devs; (3) Mangools ($49/month, $29.90 annual; free account available) - best for keyword research focus with limited daily queries; (4) Ubersuggest ($29/month or $290 lifetime) - only worth it for the lifetime deal.

The free stack guidance is particularly useful for early-stage founders: Google Search Console (free, real ranking data from Google) + Ubersuggest free tier or Mangools free account = workable free keyword research stack. The guide also notes Ahrefs launched a $29/month Starter plan in January 2026, making it more accessible for initial validation. Key caveat: Ahrefs has no free trial, no refunds - "you're committing blind" at $129/month for the meaningful Lite tier.

## Key data points / quotes

- Ahrefs Lite plan: $129/month (Starter plan launched January 2026 at $29/month with 1 project, 750 keywords).
- Semrush Pro: $139.95/month ($117.33 annual), 5 projects, 500 keywords tracked, 7-day free trial.
- SE Ranking: $65/month (~$52 annual) - "best value full-featured alternative."
- Mangools: $49/month ($29.90 annual), free account available, 200 keyword lookups/day limit.
- Ubersuggest: $29/month or $290 lifetime deal.
- Free stack recommendation: "Google Search Console + Ubersuggest free tier or Mangools free account" for early-stage projects.
- Semrush Keyword Magic Tool: 26 billion keywords accessible on Pro plan.
- Ahrefs caveat: "no free trial, no refunds - you're committing blind."
- Decision rule: "For most indie hackers under $5K MRR, Semrush Pro at $117/month annual is the better starting point."

## Implications for stinger-forge

- The four-tool matrix (Semrush, SE Ranking, Mangools, Ubersuggest) with clear positioning criteria is exactly what `guides/03-keyword-research-scoping.md` needs for the "which tool to use" section.
- The "free stack" guidance (GSC + Mangools free) is critical for the stinger to be usable by pre-revenue founders, not just those with tool budgets.
- The $5K MRR threshold as a decision point for when to invest in paid SEO tools is a practical heuristic for the stinger's audience segmentation.
- The Ahrefs "no trial, no refund" caveat should be explicitly flagged - recommending Ahrefs without this context would frustrate budget-constrained users.
- Google Search Console should be the foundational free tool recommended first, before any paid alternatives.
